name: WebProvDmLoadRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH CTE AS (SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) AS max_run_cyc FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV) UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC SET CDM_LOAD_IN = 'Y' WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'PROVIDER' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'WEBDM' AND RUN_CYC_NO <= (SELECT max_run_cyc FROM CTE) AND CDM_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:

DESCRIPTION:   Pulls data from PROD for  loading Max run cycle into the Data Mart

Annotations:
Job Name;
IdsProdDmLoadRunCycUpd_EE
Read all the Data from IDS Prod Table; 
Pull records based on ExtractRunCycle
Update P_RUN_CYC table
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
